description: Phase 0 complex-shaped task inputs. They contain multiple logical obligations or nontrivial mathematical structure, but do not prescribe whether a particular model or controller must solve or stall on them.

tasks.proof_source:
theorem complex_sum_squares_lower_bound (n : Nat) : n * n + n ≤ 2 * (n * n) := by
  {{proof}}
tasks.structural_feature: A nonlinear natural-number inequality whose proof may introduce an intermediate bound or a case split.

tasks.proof_source:

tasks.structural_feature: Two related conjunct obligations over the reals, useful for observing how a prover handles shared intermediate facts.
